---
title: "Single-case preprocessing & analysis"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Single-case analysis}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{css, echo=FALSE}
pre {
  margin-top: 0.8rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
}

.sourceCode {
  margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
}
```
## R code

### 1. Load the HARMONIC R package

```{r, eval=FALSE}
# install.packages("remotes")
# remotes::install_github("ERASMUSlab/HARMONIC")

# For exact reproducibility, pin clusterProfiler to the validated version:
# install.packages("./clusterProfiler_4.14.6.tar.gz",
#                  repos = NULL,
#                  type  = "source")
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, comment=""}
library(haRmonic)
packageVersion("clusterProfiler")
```
